caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSSES TALK" printed on the front, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table, facing right and speaking into a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features the phrase "URBAN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. Above him, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" next to a red and white "BOSS" logo and "TALK 101" text. A black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" sits on the table to his right. A small logo with a microphone icon and "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a consistent position, with only slight changes in his facial expression and head tilt as he continues speaking.
